All right, welcome to the first position in team training and that is you that is the owner So as you can see this says level one zero, I'm sorry a hundred members for all of these specific positions Don't worry about don't worry about how many members it says Essentially, we're gonna go over all the duties at each level And as you scale your business like we talked about in the previous video the owner will stop doing some of these and Have hired a different position that is doing some of them but what we're gonna go over is Everything the owner is going to do before they start delegating anything. Okay, so They're gonna be covering all the ops related tasks So there's a PDF underneath this video that you can click and download And it will have all of this stuff if you want to print it off and Go over it, but this is everything that should be getting done At your gym when you're at a level one Outside of the actual training and some of the admin stuff This is everything that should be happening and as we scale as you get to higher classes The owner will be able to delegate some of this and until there's only scaling of the business left So that's the exciting thing. Let's go over All of this stuff and also keep in mind there is the four hours document and the training portal as well So they'll be responsible for all the ops related things they'll be responsible for all of the scaling of the business related things so that includes like meetings and Optimizing ads and marketing and just all of the stuff that higher making new hires Retaining members knowing so they know when exactly they'll need to make the next hire So thinking about everything in advance. That's all scaling of the business related. They'll be doing all the sales related stuff Everything comes down to the owner as you guys know when you first get started until you start making acquisitions So moving on past that they'll be doing all the challenge related stuff. So as you start launching challenges they are going to be the ones doing the way-ins and doing the nutrition orientations and selling the supplements and making sure that the The accountability is good throughout the challenge and maybe you're leaning on some of your accountability coaches during the challenge But the until you have a challenge manager the owner is really absorbing all of that stuff Because you you won't you don't necessarily have the revenue to support another full-time person just doing challenges at least during class You know in class a Also all the retention related stuff. We don't have a retention manager yet Or if you don't have a retention manager the owner is covering all of that So that is things like running the five horsemen of retention, which is like reach outs and handwritten cards and tracking visits and Events and exit interviews those type of things are all handled by the owner and then all the training related stuff Initially before you have a full staff of trainers. Maybe you have to do morning sessions. Maybe you have to Fill in if a trainer calls and sick or something like that So as you guys know the owner does everything besides some of the training and some of the admin work at first Until we can start scaling and delegating right which is is going to be super important to do scale and delegate so the business grows because Some of this stuff like you know tracking visits can be done for a much lower Cost than what the owner's time is worth when it comes to selling or things like that so Pretty simple when it comes to this it's basically everything that is the responsibility of the owner they are responsible for everything in the world of their gym and The four hours document and training portal is also included in here and you can print and download this But this is this is basically a sheet that goes over everything that needs to happen at the gym
